selected_title: Nature of Hierarchy Organizations and its Source of Efficiency
question: Which measurable boundary in “Nature of Hierarchy Organizations and its Source of Efficiency” changes how Bureaucracy should be evaluated after “Self-managing organizations: Exploring the limits of less-hierarchical organizing”?
